description: CompositionRed and white checked shirt with grey accents, made of 100% cotton, has short puffed sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttoned placket on the front with rouching on the mid-bust area, metal brand name attached near the left hem and curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or dry cleanTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryUpgrade your feminine casual style with this checked red and white shirt from lee. The appliqued brand tab adds an element of interest, while the rouching on the placket accentuates your figure. Team this with jeans and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6.3&rdquo , Shoulders-19"
